LALALA1ED_1.korean: 탄 맞았어! 북쪽 능선에서 쏘는 것 같아!
LALALA1ED_1.english: I got hit! It feels like they're firing from the northern ridge!

LALALA1ED_2.korean: 연막 하나 던질 게, 엡실론은 엄폐하면서 옆으로 돌아!
LALALA1ED_2.english: I'll throw a smoke grenade. Epsilon, take cover and turn to the side!

LALALA1ED_3.korean: 아직 네 위치를 파악하지 못했을 거야.
LALALA1ED_3.english: I haven't figured out your position yet.

LALALA1ED_7.korean: 적 찾았어! 355 방향 나무 뒤 하나, 거리 120.
LALALA1ED_7.english: I spotted an enemy! One behind the tree at 355°, about 120 units away.

LALALA1ED_8.korean: 엡실론 네 쪽에서 노릴 수 있어?
LALALA1ED_8.english: Can you aim it from your side?

LALALA1ED_10.korean: 좋아, 그럼 처리해줘 나는 나머지 한 녀석을 찾아볼게.
LALALA1ED_10.english: Okay, then take care of that. I'll look for the other one.

LALALA1ED_12.korean: - 좋아, 엡실론의 실력이라면 무리 없이 마무리할 테니까 나는 적들의 시선을 끌어서…

LALALA1ED_15.english: I think my position has been discovered.

LALALA1ED_16.korean: 괜찮아, 네 쪽으로 접근하지 못 하게 내가 견제하고 있을 게.
LALALA1ED_16.english: It's okay, I'll keep an eye on them so they can't get close to you.

LALALA1ED_18.english: Gasp, where? Do you know the location?

LALALA1ED_19.korean: 잘 모르겠어... 아마도 같은 건물 같아.
LALALA1ED_19.english: I'm not sure... It's probably the same building.

LALALA1ED_20.english: Same building? Didn't you hear the sound?

LALALA1ED_22.korean: 포위 당했을 수도 있으니까 빠져나와 내가 봐줄 게! 연막 남은 거 있지? 하나 던져!
LALALA1ED_22.english: You might be surrounded, so get out of here! I'll keep an eye on you! Do you have any smoke grenades left? Throw one!

LALALA1ED_24.korean: 어? 엡실론 그거 연막 아니고 수류탄ㅡ
LALALA1ED_24.english: Huh? Epsilon, that's not smoke, it's a grenade—

LALALA1ED_31.english: It's okay, there are situations like this.

LALALA1ED_35.english: Epsilon... is something bothering you by any chance?

LALALA1ED_37.korean: 평소의 엡실론이라면 하지 않을 실수였다는 느낌이 들었달까…

LALALA1ED_38.korean: 공격을 빗 맞추거나 적의 접근을 눈치채지 못하는 것도 모자라서, 심지어 마지막은 연막이랑 수류탄을 착각했잖아.
LALALA1ED_38.english: I guess you could say it felt like a mistake the usual Epsilon wouldn't have made...

LALALA1ED_39.korean: 혹시 무슨 일이 있는 거라면 얼마든지 상담 가능한데.
LALALA1ED_39.english: As if missing the shot or failing to notice the enemy approaching wasn't enough, at the very end, you even mistook a smoke screen for a grenade.

LALALA1ED_40.english: If anything is wrong, I am fully available to consult with you.

LALALA1ED_41.korean: 하지만 괜찮아, 그냥 조금 컨디션이 안 좋을 뿐이야.

LALALA1ED_42.english: But it's okay, I'm just not feeling well.

LALALA1ED_43.korean: 정말로 괜찮으니까… 자, 어서 다음 매칭 돌리자.
LALALA1ED_43.english: If that is the case, it’s a relief, but…

LALALA1ED_44.english: It's really fine... so go ahead, let's get to the next match.

LALALA1ED_45.korean: 응, 나도 즐거웠어. 다음에 또 불러줘.
LALALA1ED_45.english: You worked hard. Thanks to you, I had a great time today.

LALALA1ED_46.english: Yeah, I enjoyed it too. Invite me again next time.

LALALA1ED_47.korean: 다음 주는 안 될 것 같아. 일정이 있거든.
LALALA1ED_47.english: How about next week? Is it okay?

LALALA1ED_48.english: I don't think I can make it next week. I have a schedule.

LALALA1ED_49.english: Schedule? Did you decide to do something with Ireina?

LALALA1ED_50.korean: 그런 거라면 어쩔 수 없지. 그럼 다음에 하자.

LALALA1ED_55.korean: - 결국 마지막까지 엡실론의 상태 안 좋아 보였지…

LALALA1ED_56.korean: - 말로는 괜찮다고 했지만, 역시 마음에 걸려.

LALALA1ED_58.korean: - 좋아, 이럴 때 적극적으로 행동하는 게 사령관이 해야할 일이 아니겠어?
LALALA1ED_58.english: Okay, isn't it the commander's job to step up in moments like this?

LALALA1ED_62.english: Ahaha… when will I recover this…

LALALA1ED_63.korean:
응? 엡실론 언니에게 무슨 일 있냐고?
몹 몇 무리 몰아 올게.
LALALA1ED_63.english: Huh? You’re asking if something’s wrong with Epsilon? I’ll lure a few mobs over.

LALALA1ED_64.korean:
어제 같이 듀오 했는데 뭔가 상태가 좀 이상해 보였거든.
좋아, 빡딜 사이클 대기 중!
LALALA1ED_64.english: Ah, come to think of it, is it already that time? Oh, there are more people flocking here than I expected.

LALALA1ED_65.korean:
아, 그러고 보니 벌써 그 시기인가?
오오, 생각보다 더 많이 몰려들었네.
LALALA1ED_65.english: What time period? Wait, isn’t that too much? My range skill is on cooldown…

LALALA1ED_66.korean:
무슨 시기?
잠깐, 너무 많은 거 아니야? 나 범위기 쿨인데...
LALALA1ED_66.english: I don’t know the exact details, but every year around this time, Epsilon‑nee seemed so listless, as if she were lost in worry. It’s okay, it’s okay, you can do it! Demon King Oppa!

LALALA1ED_67.korean:
나도 자세히는 모르지만, 매년 이 시기만 되면 엡실론 언니는 고민에 빠진 것처럼 기운이 없었어.
괜찮아, 괜찮아 할 수 있어! 마왕 오빠!
LALALA1ED_67.english: Hmm, the fact that it’s been like this every year means there really is something going on. Argh~ My fingers are going to break~ Keep a close eye on the trolling!

LALALA1ED_68.korean:
흠, 매년 그래왔다는건 역시 뭔가가 있다는 건데.
크으아아~ 손가락 부러지겠다~ 어그로 튀지 않게 잘 잡아줘!
LALALA1ED_68.english: Still, Epsilon will go back to her usual self in a few days, so you don’t need to worry too much. Don’t worry! Leave Tang to Ireina!

LALALA1ED_69.korean:
그래도 며칠 있으면 다시 평소의 엡실론 언니로 돌아오니까 그렇게 걱정하지 않아도 괜찮아.
걱정마! 탱은 이레이나에게 맡겨!

LALALA1ED_70.english: I told you to trust only Ireina!

LALALA1ED_71.english: Ireina, you’re the only one I trust!

LALALA1ED_72.english: Hero Ireina… thank you for saving me.

LALALA1ED_73.korean: 엣헴! 좀 더 용사 이레이나를 칭찬하도록!
LALALA1ED_73.english: Ahem! Praise Hero Ireina a little more!

LALALA1ED_74.korean: 역시 용사 이레이나야! 아무나 할 수 없는 일을 태연히 해치워! 그 모습에 끌려! 동경하게 돼!
LALALA1ED_74.english: As expected of the hero Ireina! She effortlessly accomplishes things that no one else can! I am drawn to that sight! I find myself admiring her!

LALALA1ED_77.korean: 너무 기운이 없어 보이니까… 혹시 무슨 문제가 있는 거라면 내가 도와줄 방법은 없을까 했지.
LALALA1ED_77.english: You looked so down… I wondered if there was something wrong and if there was a way I could help.

LALALA1ED_78.english: The Demon King is still the same, too.

LALALA1ED_80.korean: 왜 매년 이 시기가 되면 엡실론 기운이 없어지는지 말이야.
LALALA1ED_80.english: I wonder why the Epsilon energy disappears every year around this time.

LALALA1ED_82.korean: 그렇다면 이번 기회에 같이 이유를 밝혀내보지 않을래?
LALALA1ED_82.english: In that case, why don’t we take this opportunity to figure out the reason together?

LALALA1ED_83.korean: 엡실론을 도와줄 수 있을 방법을 찾아낼 수 있을지 모르잖아.
LALALA1ED_83.english: You never know if we might be able to find a way to help Epsilon.

LALALA1ED_84.korean: 엡실론 언니를 위한 거라면 난 좋아!
LALALA1ED_84.english: If it’s for Epsilon, I like it!

LALALA1ED_85.korean: 좋아, 그럼 같이 엡실론을 기운나게 해보자고!
LALALA1ED_85.english: Alright, then let’s cheer up Epsilon together!
